constraint.description: Every binder structurally wires its co-located ContributionModel and at least one passive slot surface.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (source:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:ViewLayerType {viewBucket: 'BINDER'}) WHERE NOT source.fqn CONTAINS '$' WITH source, split(source.fqn, '.') AS sourceSegments OPTIONAL MATCH (source)-[:DEPENDS_ON]->(model:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:ViewLayerType {viewBucket: 'MODEL'}) WITH source, sourceSegments, collect(DISTINCT model) AS modelCandidates WITH source, sourceSegments, [ model IN modelCandidates WHERE model IS NOT NULL AND NOT model.fqn CONTAINS '$' AND size(sourceSegments) >= 4 AND size(split(model.fqn, '.')) >= 4 AND split(model.fqn, '.')[2] = sourceSegments[2] AND split(model.fqn, '.')[3] = sourceSegments[3] ] AS ownModels OPTIONAL MATCH (source)-[:DEPENDS_ON]->(slotSurface:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:ViewLayerType {viewBucket: 'VIEW'}) WITH source, size(ownModels) AS ownModelCount, collect(DISTINCT slotSurface) AS slotSurfaceCandidates WITH source, ownModelCount, [ slotSurface IN slotSurfaceCandidates WHERE slotSurface IS NOT NULL AND NOT slotSurface.fqn CONTAINS '$' AND size(split(slotSurface.fqn, '.')) >= 4 AND ( ( split(slotSurface.fqn, '.')[2] = split(source.fqn, '.')[2] AND split(slotSurface.fqn, '.')[3] = split(source.fqn, '.')[3] ) OR split(slotSurface.fqn, '.')[2] = 'slotcontent' ) ] AS slotSurfaces WITH source, ownModelCount, size(slotSurfaces) AS slotSurfaceCount WHERE ownModelCount = 0 OR slotSurfaceCount = 0 RETURN DISTINCT source.relativePath AS Source, 'direct dependency on the co-located ContributionModel and at least one active-root or slotcontent passive View' AS ExpectedDirection, CASE WHEN ownModelCount = 0 AND slotSurfaceCount = 0 THEN 'missing co-located ContributionModel and passive slot-surface dependency' WHEN ownModelCount = 0 THEN 'missing co-located ContributionModel dependency' ELSE 'missing passive slot-surface dependency' END AS ActualDirection, 'Binders must instantiate and bind their ContributionModel and slot surfaces.' AS Details ORDER BY Source

constraint.description: Binders own slot wiring and domain service lookup without reaching forbidden dependencies.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (source:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:ViewLayerType)-[:DEPENDS_ON]->(target:Java:Type) WHERE source.viewBucket = 'BINDER' WITH source, target, split(source.fqn, '.') AS sourceSegments, split(target.fqn, '.') AS targetSegments WHERE target.fqn =~ 'bootstrap\\..*' OR target.fqn =~ 'src\\.data\\..*' OR target.fqn =~ 'shell\\.host\\..*' OR (target.fqn =~ 'shell\\..*' AND NOT target.fqn =~ 'shell\\.api\\..*') OR ( target.fqn =~ 'src\\.domain\\..*' AND NOT target.fqn =~ 'src\\.domain\\.[^.]+\\.[^.]+ApplicationService(\\$.*)?' AND NOT target.fqn =~ 'src\\.domain\\.[^.]+\\.published\\..+' ) OR ( target.fqn =~ 'src\\.view\\..*' AND ( NOT (target.viewBucket IN ['CONTRIBUTION', 'BINDER', 'MODEL', 'HANDLER', 'VIEW', 'VIEW_INPUT_EVENT']) OR NOT ( ( size(sourceSegments) >= 4 AND size(targetSegments) >= 4 AND sourceSegments[2] = targetSegments[2] AND sourceSegments[3] = targetSegments[3] AND target.viewBucket IN ['BINDER', 'MODEL', 'HANDLER', 'VIEW', 'VIEW_INPUT_EVENT'] ) OR ( size(targetSegments) >= 6 AND targetSegments[2] = 'slotcontent' AND target.viewBucket IN ['MODEL', 'VIEW', 'VIEW_INPUT_EVENT'] ) ) ) ) RETURN DISTINCT source.relativePath AS Source, coalesce(target.relativePath, target.fqn) AS Target, 'binders may depend only on shell.api, same-root models/Views, closed reusable slotcontent units, and domain public boundaries' AS ExpectedDirection, source.fqn + ' -> ' + target.fqn AS ActualDirection, 'Binders must not depend on old topology, data, bootstrap, shell internals, or the wrong view-layer role.' AS Details ORDER BY Source, Target
